summary: Current House: 213 D vs 219 R (6-seat gap), 3 vacancies all likely filled by same party
content: As of Jan 5, 2026: Democrats 213, Republicans 219, 3 vacancies. Vacancies: TX-18 (D seat, runoff Jan 31), NJ-11 (D seat, special Apr 16), GA-14 (R seat, MTG resigned). All likely filled by same party. After filling: ~215 D vs 220 R = 5-seat gap. Democrats gaining control before Jan 3, 2027 requires closing a 6+ seat gap through vacancies/special elections, which is historically unprecedented.
